ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., diagonal, gaussian) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., satellite, sensor) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "spatial_reference_system" TEXT /* Spatial reference system used */,
  "metadata_url" TEXT /* URL to additional metadata or documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "dataset1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first dataset in the comparison */,
  "dataset2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second dataset in the comparison */,
  "cardinality_x" REAL /* Cardinality of dataset1 */,
  "avg_area_x" REAL /* Average area of dataset1 */,
  "avg_x_x" REAL /* Average x-coordinate of dataset1 */,
  "avg_y_x" REAL /* Average y-coordinate of dataset1 */,
  "e0_x" REAL /* E0 metric for dataset1 */,
  "e2_x" REAL /* E2 metric for dataset1 */,
  "block_size_x" INTEGER /* Block size for dataset1 */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was performed */,
  "comparison_method" TEXT /* Method used for comparison */,
  "comparison_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_dataset2_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset2_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_dataset1_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset1_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics_x" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison this statistic belongs to */,
  "total_area_x" REAL /* Total area for dataset1 */,
  "total_margin_x" REAL /* Total margin for dataset1 */,
  "total_overlap_x" REAL /* Total overlap for dataset1 */,
  "size_std_x" REAL /* Standard deviation of size for dataset1 */,
  "block_util_x" REAL /* Block utilization for dataset1 */,
  "total_blocks_x" INTEGER /* Total blocks for dataset1 */,
  "min_area" REAL /* Minimum area in the dataset */,
  "max_area" REAL /* Maximum area in the dataset */,
  "median_area" REAL /* Median area in the dataset */,
  "area_variance" REAL /* Variance of the area in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the statistics were computed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_x_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics_y" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison this statistic belongs to */,
  "cardinality_y" INTEGER /* Cardinality of dataset2 */,
  "avg_area_y" REAL /* Average area of dataset2 */,
  "avg_x_y" REAL /* Average x-coordinate of dataset2 */,
  "avg_y_y" REAL /* Average y-coordinate of dataset2 */,
  "e0_y" REAL /* E0 metric for dataset2 */,
  "e2_y" REAL /* E2 metric for dataset2 */,
  "block_size_y" INTEGER /* Block size for dataset2 */,
  "min_area" REAL /* Minimum area in the dataset */,
  "max_area" REAL /* Maximum area in the dataset */,
  "median_area" REAL /* Median area in the dataset */,
  "area_variance" REAL /* Variance of the area in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the statistics were computed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_y_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similarities" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity entry */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison this similarity belongs to */,
  "join_selectivity" REAL /* Join selectivity measure */,
  "mbr_tests_selectivity" REAL /* MBR tests selectivity measure */,
  "intersection_area1" REAL /* Area of intersection for dataset1 */,
  "intersection_area2" REAL /* Area of intersection for dataset2 */,
  "jaccard_similarity" REAL /* Jaccard similarity score */,
  "similarity_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the similarity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the similarity metrics were computed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarities_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)
